approach: Wire workflow commands into the existing enhancement button pipeline by extending resolveEnhancementButtons() to merge both customCommands and workflow commands sources
last_action: T004 complete — added unit tests for getWorkflowCommands and clarify handler workflow fallback
decisions: Deduplicate buttons by command string — customCommands take priority over workflow commands

T001.did: Added getWorkflowCommands() helper to workflowManager.ts and exported from index.ts

T002.did: Extended resolveEnhancementButtons() to merge workflow commands with customCommands, with deduplication

T003.did: Extended handleClarify() to fall back to workflow commands when no customCommand matches

T004.did: Added tests for getWorkflowCommands and clarify handler workflow fallback (4 + 4 tests)

specify.key_finding: resolveEnhancementButtons only reads customCommands config, ignoring workflow commands array entirely

plan.approach_summary: Wire workflow commands into the existing enhancement button pipeline by extending resolveEnhancementButtons() to merge both customCommands and workflow commands sources
risks: Duplicate buttons if same command configured in both customCommands and customWorkflows[].commands
